questions.question_html: Write the next three natural numbers after 10999.
questions.solution_html: The next three natural numbers after 10999 are 11000, 11001 and 11002.

questions.question_html: Write the three whole numbers occuring just before 10001.
questions.solution_html: The three whole numbers occuring just before 10001 are 10000, 9999 and 9998.

questions.question_html: How many whole numbers are there between 32 and 53?

questions.solution_html:
The successor of a number is the number obtained by adding one to it, also known as the "after number".
2440701 + 1 = 2440702
Therefore, the successor of 2440701 is 2440702.

The successor of a number is the number obtained by adding one to it, also known as the "after number."
100199 + 1 = 100200
Therefore, the successor of 100199 is 100200.

The successor of a number is the number obtained by adding one to it, also known as the "after number."
1099999 + 1 = 1100000
Therefore, the successor of 1099999 is 1100000

The successor of a number is the number obtained by adding one to it, also known as the after number.
2345670 + 1 = 2345671
Therefore, successor of 2345670 is 2345671

We know that The predeccessor of a number is the number obtained by substracting one from the given number, also known as the before number.
94 - 1 = 93

We know that the predeccessor of a number is the number obtained by substracting one from the given number, also known as the before number.
Therefore, 10000 - 1 = 9999 is the predecessor of 10000.

The predecessor of a number is the number obtained by subtracting one from the given number, also known as the before number.
Therefore, the predecessor of 208090 is, 208090 - 1 = 208089

The predeccessor of a number is the number obtained by substracting one from the given number, also known as the before number.
Therefore, predecessor of 7654321 is, 7654321 - 1 = 7654320

questions.question_html: The pair of numbers 530, 503, state which the whole number is on the left of the other number on the number line. Also write the appropriate sign (>, <) between them.
questions.solution_html:
530 ˃ 503
Therefore, 503 is on the left side of the number 530 on the number line.

questions.question_html: The pair of numbers 370, 307, state which the whole number is on the left of the other number on the number line. Also write the appropriate sign (>, <) between them.
questions.solution_html:
370 ˃ 307
Therefore, 307 is on the left side of the number 370 on the number line.

questions.question_html: The pair of numbers 98765, 56789, state which the whole number is on the left of the other number on the number line. Also write the appropriate sign (>, <) between them.
questions.solution_html:
98765 ˃ 56789
Therefore, 56789 is on the left side of the number 98765 on the number line.

questions.question_html: The pair of numbers 9830415, 10023001, state which the whole number is on the left of the other number on the number line. Also write the appropriate sign (>, <) between them.
questions.solution_html:
9830415 ˂ 10023001
Therfore, 9830415 is on the left side of the 10023001 on the number line.

questions.question_html: The predecessor of a two digit number is never a single digit number.
The successor of a two digit number is always a two digit number.
